headline: Does CrowdStrike (CRWD) Still Offer Value After Its Recent Share Price Climb?
summary: If you are wondering whether CrowdStrike Holdings at around US$468 a share is priced for perfection or still has room to run, the next step is to break that intuition into clear valuation checks. The stock has returned 3.5% over the past week, 17.4% over the last 30 days, 3.2% year to date and 10.8% over the past year, which gives useful context before you weigh what the current price might imply. Recent headlines have focused on CrowdStrike's role in cybersecurity and its position within...

headline: CrowdStrike Announces Speaker Lineup for Day Zero Threat Research Summit
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, May 07, 2026--CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) today announced the keynote and featured speaker lineup for its inaugural Day Zero Threat Research Summit. The summit will take place August 30 - September 1, 2026 at the Virgin Hotel in Las Vegas as part of Fal.Con 2026, the premier cybersecurity event of the year.

headline: Is the Fortinet Stock Rally Sustainable?
summary: Fortinet stock (FTNT) surged to $104 in extended trading following its first quarter 2026 earnings report on May 6, 2026. This "beat and raise" performance saw revenue hit $1.85 billion, representing 20.1% year-over-year growth and surpassing analyst estimates of $1.77 billion. While the market frequently rewards top-line growth, the underlying shift toward AI-driven security suggests a fundamental change in Fortinet's trajectory.

headline: CrowdStrike Announces Date of Fiscal First Quarter 2027 Financial Results Conference Call
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, May 07, 2026--CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWD), today announced that it will release financial results for its fiscal first quarter 2027 ended April 30, 2026 after the U.S. market close on Wednesday, June 3, 2026. CrowdStrike will host a conference call that day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific time (5:00 p.m. Eastern time) to discuss the results.

headline: GuidePoint Security Wins 2026 CrowdStrike Americas Partner of the Year Award
summary: MIAMI & RESTON, Va., May 07, 2026--GuidePoint Security is named CrowdStrike’s 2026 Americas Partner of the Year for its leadership in cybersecurity and threat protection.
